name: etoro
description: Connect Claude to your eToro account for portfolio analysis, market research, and trading.
long_description: Investment research and portfolio analysis on your eToro account: assess positions, research instruments, vet popular investors, backtest strategies. Trading is supported, but use `demo` mode first — AI-driven real-money orders are risky.

tools.name: etoro_search_instruments
tools.description: Search instruments by keyword or exact ticker (stocks, crypto, ETFs).

tools.name: etoro_get_instruments
tools.description: Get full instrument details by IDs (1–100).

tools.name: etoro_get_instrument_types
tools.description: List all instrument types eToro supports.

tools.name: etoro_get_industries
tools.description: List industry classifications for stock instruments.

tools.name: etoro_get_exchanges
tools.description: List stock exchanges eToro supports.

tools.name: etoro_get_candles
tools.description: Get OHLCV candles for technical analysis and backtesting.

tools.name: etoro_get_closing_prices
tools.description: Get historical daily closing prices.

tools.name: etoro_get_rates
tools.description: Get live bid/ask rates for instruments.

tools.name: etoro_get_portfolio
tools.description: Get portfolio + P&L: positions, unrealized P&L, exposure summary, longest holding.

tools.name: etoro_get_orders
tools.description: List all pending orders (limit / entry).

tools.name: etoro_get_trade_history
tools.description: Closed-trade history with entry/exit, P&L, duration.

tools.name: etoro_open_position
tools.description: Open a position by USD amount or units (mutually exclusive).

tools.name: etoro_close_position
tools.description: Close a position fully or partially via unitsToDeduct.

tools.name: etoro_place_limit_order
tools.description: Place a limit / entry order at a specified price.

tools.name: etoro_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a pending order.

tools.name: etoro_get_current_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's identity (GCID, real/demo CIDs).

tools.name: etoro_get_user_profile
tools.description: Get a user's public profile by username.

tools.name: etoro_get_user_performance
tools.description: Get a user's trading performance (optionally by period).

tools.name: etoro_get_user_trades
tools.description: Get a user's trade info for a period.

tools.name: etoro_get_user_portfolio
tools.description: Get a user's live public portfolio holdings.

tools.name: etoro_discover_users
tools.description: Discover popular investors filtered by gain, risk score, period.

tools.name: etoro_get_copiers
tools.description: Get info about users currently copying your portfolio.

tools.name: etoro_get_watchlists
tools.description: List your watchlists.

tools.name: etoro_create_watchlist
tools.description: Create a new watchlist.

tools.name: etoro_delete_watchlist
tools.description: Delete a watchlist.

tools.name: etoro_rename_watchlist
tools.description: Rename a watchlist.

tools.name: etoro_add_watchlist_items
tools.description: Add instruments to a watchlist.

tools.name: etoro_remove_watchlist_item
tools.description: Remove an instrument from a watchlist.

tools.name: etoro_set_default_watchlist
tools.description: Mark a watchlist as default.

tools.name: etoro_get_curated_lists
tools.description: Get eToro's curated / featured instrument lists.

tools.name: etoro_get_public_watchlists
tools.description: Browse a user's public watchlists.

tools.name: etoro_get_instrument_feed
tools.description: Get the social feed for an instrument.

tools.name: etoro_get_user_feed
tools.description: Get the social feed for a user.

tools.name: etoro_create_post
tools.description: Create a new post on the eToro social feed.

tools.name: etoro_create_comment
tools.description: Comment on an existing post.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your eToro API key (x-api-key header value).

user_key.title: User Key
user_key.description: Your eToro user key (x-user-key header value) tied to your account.

trading_mode.title: Trading Mode
trading_mode.description: Use 'demo' for the practice account or 'real' for live trading.
